description: Verified non-duplicate pairs — same address but distinct venues/experiences. Audit-duplicates.js skips these. Append entries as user confirms keeps.

pairs.reason: Underground at the Mob Museum is the speakeasy in the basement — distinct experience from the museum itself. User-confirmed keep-both.
